lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'succeeded', 'notes': 'Eclipsys SunriseXA Release 3.3 was a specific 2004-era version of the EHR platform. Eclipsys was acquired by Allscripts in 2010 for $1.3B. The product was rebranded as Allscripts Sunrise, later transferred to Altera Digital Health. Current version is Sunrise 25.1 (2026). The specific release 3.3 is succeeded.', 'source': 'https://histalk2.com/2010/06/09/industry-reaction-allscripts-to-acquire-eclipsys/'}
notes: Interim release; combines Sunrise Clinical Manager 3.04 workflow engine with SunriseXA database schema; fixes October 2003 response time issues

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'active', 'notes': 'Mercury LoadRunner is still actively maintained. Mercury Interactive was acquired by HP in 2006, then sold to Micro Focus in 2017, then to OpenText. LoadRunner 2023 R1 was released July 2023 with ongoing updates. Currently OpenText LoadRunner.', 'source': 'https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/LoadRunner'}
notes: Industry-standard load testing software; Mercury TestCenter 7.8 version used in benchmark
